rationale: The cited paper appears only in a grouped methodological citation when the authors state that their forward-backward Gibbs sampler is preferable to direct Gibbs approaches. The citing paper does not discuss Moon et al. (2007)'s specific model, assumptions, findings, or empirical context, nor does it build its hypotheses or core framework on that study. In context, Moon et al. is used as an example of prior estimation work rather than as a distinct intellectual basis for this paper's contribution.
